vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Continuous load path from wing skin through main spar to fuselage frames
Thermal load from sun to main spar
Bending motion from wing tip to wing root
Service access for battery bay maintenance

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect assembly due to complex fastener pattern.
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly instructions and pre-assembled subcomponents.

generated_parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
generated_parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.
Ensure all required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Each stated requirement maps to a verification method (inspection, demonstration, analysis, test) tied to a named feature or interface.
Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.
Critical joints state locking method (locknut, insert, washer, adhesive note) and torque/preload intent; bolt patterns match load direction.

risk.desc: Potential weak interface at motor mount due to thin wall thickness.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness or use reinforcement ribs around the motor mount.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate cooling flow if the cooling inlet is obstructed.
risk.mit: Design cooling inlet with larger dimensions or add multiple inlets to ensure sufficient airflow.

risk.desc: Fasteners may not be adequately preloaded if torque settings are not followed.
risk.mit: Specify torque settings and ensure assembly instructions are clear and followed.

risk.desc: Risk of service access being blocked if the service access window is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure service access window is properly aligned with the motor mount and propeller access points.

risk.desc: Potential for interface mismatch if adjacent subsystems are not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure all adjacent subsystems are properly aligned and use appropriate fastening methods.
